name: Communication with a web site known to aid in distribution of malware
notes: This rule triggers when a communication with a web site know to aid in distribution of malware has been observed.
conditions_text: when a flow matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Successful Communication
when the flow context is Local to Remote

when the flow matches Application is any of [Web.Malware(misc) or Web.Malware(hack) or Web.Malware(exploit) or Web.Malware(rogue) or Web.Malware(attack) or Web.Malware(backdoor) or Web.Malware(suspicious)]
TD_list: APPLY Communication with a web site known to aid in distribution of malware on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when a flow matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Successful Communication
AND when the flow context is Local to Remote

AND when the flow matches Application is any of [Web.Malware(misc) or Web.Malware(hack) or Web.Malware(exploit) or Web.Malware(rogue) or Web.Malware(attack) or Web.Malware(backdoor) or Web.Malware(suspicious)]
RED_list: Event name: Communication with a web site know to aid in distribution of malware
Event description: The host being communicated with is on a list of host know to be involved in the distribution of malware.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
